title: InformationCube Trade Show Demo Units
summary:
Revenue: $250/day rental fee; target exhibitors at trade shows.
- **Time to first $**: 5 days (secure first trade show booking).
- **First action**: Run Serper search for "trade show exhibitor tech needs," then email 50 exhibitors with "free demo unit" offer.
- **Risk**: Need physical logistics (mitigated by using fab lab for quick setup).
